result.title: 2026 Americas NVIDIA Partner Network Awards | GTC 2026
result.description:
NVIDIA is honoring the 2026 Americas NVIDIA Partner Network (NPN) award winners, who are leading the next wave of AI innovation, execution and industry impact across the region. These partners are helping customers move from pilots to production with NVIDIA’s full-stack platform — spanning accelerated computing, networking and NVIDIA AI Enterprise software.

This year’s Americas honorees include rising stars, AI excellence and advanced technology partners, as well as leaders in networking, consulting and global systems integrators. They’re modernizing infrastructure, streamlining operations and unlocking new products and services for customers across the Americas.

Learn more: https://blogs.nvidia.com/blog/gtc-2026-news/#npn-partner-awards

result.title: NVIDIA Omniverse Foundational Technology Montage I GTC 2026 Edition
result.description:
NVIDIA Omniverse™ is a collection of libraries and microservices for developing physical AI applications such as industrial digital twins and robotics simulation. 

Learn more about #NVIDIAOmniverse: https://omniverse.nvidia.com/

result.title: OpenClaw: The ChatGPT Moment for Long-Running, Autonomous Agents
result.description:
A silent revolution in AI is rewriting the rules of computation. Autonomous, self-evolving ""claws"" like OpenClaw are now being adopted at an unprecedented pace, demonstrating their ability to execute complex, long-running goals indefinitely. These agents write code, manage entire workflows, and access local files, ushering in the new application layer for AI. But with unprecedented self-evolving capability, guardrails are essential to give users control over how agents behave and handle data. Watch to understand this explosive shift and the infrastructure emerging to govern long-running agents more safely.

Learn more about how to run autonomous agents safely: https://www.nvidia.com/nemoclaw

#OpenClaw #NVIDIAGTC #AgenticAI

result.title: How NVIDIA Open Models Power Every Industry’s AI
result.description:
AI is not one-size-fits-all—no single model can serve every industry, workload, or research domain. In this video, we explore how NVIDIA open models power one of the world’s largest and most diverse AI ecosystems, spanning language, vision, biology, physics, and autonomous systems.

See how nearly three million open models and six frontier open model families give developers the building blocks to customize AI for specialized domains. New leaderboard-topping models are launching for every family. And at their core: Nemotron reasoning models.

Learn more about NVIDIA open model families: Nemotron, Cosmos, Alpamayo, Isaac GR00T, BioNeMo, and Earth-2.

Read Press Release: https://nvidianews.nvidia.com/news/nvidia-expands-open-model-families-to-power-the-next-wave-of-agentic-physical-and-healthcare-ai

#OpenModels #Nemotron #NVIDIAGTC

result.title: A Decade of AI Infrastructure Innovation: From NVIDIA DGX-1 to NVIDIA Vera Rubin
result.description:
Explore the journey from NVIDIA DGX‑1 to the revolutionary NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform, showing how rack‑scale AI supercomputers built with NVIDIA AI Infrastructure are redefining what’s possible in agentic AI.

Learn more about the NVIDIA Vera Rubin Platform: https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/technologies/rubin/

#GTC2026 #NVIDIAVeraRubin #NVIDIADGX
